tools.name: web_collection
tools.description: Collect, harvest, search, render, and validate archived web-source runs.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch one URL into a provenance-preserving web collection run.

tools.name: archive_page
tools.description: Capture one rendered page with Playwright artifacts.

tools.name: html_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert a local HTML file to GitHub-Flavored Markdown with Pandoc.

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Extract local web artifact metadata, hashes, titles, and links.
